messages.speaker: orchestrator
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Rework auth backend
SCOPE: src/auth
OUT_OF_SCOPE: frontend
OWNERSHIP: src/auth/**
DEPENDENCIES: shared auth contract
STEPS: refactor backend
DELIVERABLES: backend changes
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: auth stays green
NON-NEGOTIABLE: keep public API stable
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after backend refactor")

Task(subagent_type="frontend-specialist", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Refresh login screen
SCOPE: src/auth/login.tsx
OUT_OF_SCOPE: backend
OWNERSHIP: src/auth/login.tsx
DEPENDENCIES: current auth API
STEPS: update login form
DELIVERABLES: login UI changes
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: UI builds
NON-NEGOTIABLE: no backend edits
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after UI refresh")
